title: keraselma sylvaticum
intro: Keraselma sylvaticum, also known as Woodruff, is a perennial herb native to Europe, with a sweet, vanilla-like fragrance and a preference for shaded, moist environments. The medicinal properties of Keraselma sylvaticum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Woodruff include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Keraselma sylvaticum typically involve infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
